news.title: SEG Plaza Renovation Completed: New Floors Open
news.title_cn: 赛格广场装修完成：新楼层开放
news.summary: Floors 8-10 have been renovated and now host over 200 new component vendors.
news.summary_cn: 8至10楼已完成翻新，新增200多家元器件商户。

news.title: New Metro Exit E Connects Directly to SEG Plaza
news.title_cn: 地铁E出口直达赛格广场
news.summary: Exit E of Huaqiang North Station now opens directly into SEG Plaza B1.
news.summary_cn: 华强北站E出口现已直通赛格广场负一楼。
